Real Questions from Real Members

These are actual questions AI Income OS members ask Delphi every day. Not staged. Not scripted. Real people, building real businesses, getting real answers at 2 AM. To get Delphi unlimited access (+ upcoming updates), get AI Income OS.

New answer Answered in 2s 24/7
B
Bailey Delphi
My listings are not getting views. What do I fix first?
Start with your titles and tags. Most new sellers use vague keywords. Use specific long-tail phrases your buyers actually search for. I can walk you through the exact SEO checklist Bailey uses.
Should I use Canva or Midjourney for my printables?
Both. Midjourney for unique artwork and backgrounds. Canva for layout, text, and final formatting. Bailey's workflow uses them together, which is covered in the AI Printables track.
I have been at this for 3 weeks and no sales. Is that normal?
Totally normal. Most members see their first sale between week 3-6. The ones who get there faster usually have 15+ listings. How many do you have up right now?
SEO and visibility
behind the scenes

Okay But How Does It Actually Work?

Trained on Everything

Not just the course content. The coaching calls. The Q&A sessions. The DMs I answer.

The strategies I use in my own shops. The stuff I share in the community that never makes it to YouTube.

Every lesson, every prompt, every framework I have ever taught. All of it is loaded in there.

In Bailey's Voice

It talks like me. Direct. No fluff.

If you have watched my YouTube videos, you will recognize the tone immediately. It is not going to give you a 500-word essay when you need a yes or no.

It is going to tell you what to do, why, and how. Just like I would on a coaching call.

It Gets Smarter

Okay this part is honestly my favorite. Most AI tools are frozen in time. Delphi evolves.

When someone asks something it cannot answer yet, it does not make something up. It flags the gap. I get notified. I add the answer.

And then every single member benefits from that question forever.

Fun fact: In month one, 200+ new answers got added just from member questions. Give it six months and this thing will probably know my own business better than I do.

Honest About Limits

If Delphi does not know something, it says so. No making stuff up.

It will literally say "I am not sure about that, but I have flagged it for Bailey to review."

I built it that way on purpose. I would rather it just say "I do not know" than give you bad advice that costs you money.

I get asked this a lot: "Is it actually you?" Here is the honest answer.

"It is not me personally. But it knows what I know. And for those 'it is 11 PM, I am stuck, and I just need someone to tell me what to do next' moments? It is exactly what you need."

- Bailey Vann

Real coaching happens once a month on live calls. Delphi fills in the gaps between them. Any time, from anywhere.
